Value: Full-month target dated on first day of month; phased by Calendar_MDM working days only
Actual_Sales Product is mapped through Product_MDM to Bottle/Draught Category. Actual Volume is converted in code to crate equivalent before dashboard calculations.
Bottle/crate products = 1.0. Keg/draught products = 30L keg / 7.92L bottle crate = 3.787878 crate equivalent.
Sales_Target Bottle category is treated as crate. Sales_Target Draught category is treated as keg count and converted to crate equivalent.
